name: Drizella
description:
Drizella has a slender figure, fair skin, black eyes, and shoulder-length, black hair with rolled locks on the back and a light blue ribbon on her head. As a child, her hair is a lighter shade of brown and worn in the same style. Her feet are also very large and ungainly, so much that she has difficulty squeezing it into Cinderella's glass slipper when trying it on.

Drizella's trademark appearance consists of different shades of yellow, chartreuse, and light green. As a child, she wears a yellow, short-sleeved dress with a white-winged collar and a red gem in the center. As an adult, Drizella wears a short-sleeved dress that is yellow and light green except for the bodice, which is a deeper shade of yellow, and dark green flats. Her ballgown consists of different shades of green with cyan frill outlines and has a single light teal feather on her head
creator: RandomGuyorNot
